goal: is_isometry[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn) = forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(x0).distance(complex_conj_fn(x1)) = x0.distance(x1) }

p.c: function[T0: lib(metric_space).MetricSpace, T1: lib(metric_space).MetricSpace](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1.distance(x2) = x0(x1).distance(x0(x2)) } = is_isometry[T0, T1](x0) }[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn)
not forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { x0.distance(x1) = complex_conj_fn(x0).distance(complex_conj_fn(x1)) }
let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k2: Complex) { w0.distance(k2) != complex_conj_fn(w0).distance(complex_conj_fn(k2)) } }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(x0).distance(complex_conj_fn(x1)) = x0.distance(x1) }(w0, w2)
